review_text: My wife and I have stayed at Levi Park with our caravan many times over the years, usually on an ensuite site. It is in a fabulous location, close to the city with public transport a short walk away across the lovely adjoining sports field. There is also a really good shopping centre just down the road at Walkerville. As we do a lot of serious walking, there are numerous walks nearby, particularly along the adjacent Linear Park path. |The park is relatively quiet given its closeness to the city. It has great facilities, friendly and helpful staff and is overall a fantastic place to stay.

Don’t know what the cabins are like. They look good though. Caravan sites are good.  Only powered sites available. Some can be a bit tricky getting into but plenty of room otherwise. Short drive into the city. Bus just outside of park to get into the city to save on parking costs. Staff are fabulous, helpful and friendly. Amenities are clean and well maintained.
We would stay again.

Great location, about 20 minutes by bus into centre. Quiet and clean campsite. Camp kitchen has everything you need. Toilets and showers were kept clean, however do shut for an hour and no other toilet or shower to use.

Had washing and towels stolen from the washing lines during the day. Reception aware of this as have had other reports of this recently. Reception unable to do anything about it and have no camera on that area. Anyone can enter park to use facilities and more so reception have no control over who comes and goes by foot.
Would not recommend leaving anything that cannot be locked away as will be stolen.

At Levi Park, you get to wake up to the sound of magpies and not traffic even though you’re so close to the city centre. It’s a really tiptop park in a beautiful location alongside the Torrens River. Walking paths, public transport … and nature. Vale House is especially fine for solo travellers without a van.
Great park - close to the city. Love staying there whenever I come to the city. Highly recommend.

Levi Holiday Park is our Adelaide home away from home.||We live in rural South Australia. Often we can drive to Adelaide and back in one day.|However, when, for whatever reason, a stay that requires more than one day, Levi is our port of call.||The location is ideal, being right next to the Linear Park and the River Torrens. Sometimes there is even a resident koala or two.||While some of the cabins are a bit tired, Amanda and Christian are continuing to replace these with new ones.||What is really outstanding is the way Amanda and Christian and their team look after us. When we have had to stay several nights for various appointments, and nothing was too much trouble. Late check-out, early arrival, extra coffee, patience with changing bookings that were out of our control; all done with a smile and warm wishes.|| it is reassuring to know that the folk at Levi will look after us whenever we are in Adelaide.
We use Levi often. Always clean and well presented. Stayed Thursday before Good Friday and avoided the noisy teenager. No problem just not our generation. Look forward to our next stay.

Beautifully located park and very close to the city. They have a great range of cabins. Equipped with everything you need. Very friendly staff. We always choose to stay here when we must visit Adelaide for appointments ( & shopping 😉)

Lovely park. Spaces were smallish but I had a comfortable dog-friendly ensuite site. Actually it's a great place for dogs, with a mostly fenced oval right behind the park. Under cover dog-friendly seating area next to the camp kitchen as well. Ensuite was very new and spotlessly clean. Staff were helpful and friendly. Recommended!
Thanks so much to all the staff! We been there with a friend and my dog, we had a really good time!!|Thanks
Staff are the best I've been in lots of place always happy to help and cabins are keeped clean thanks for the great job you do
Great park. Great office staff always friendly and helpful. |Kev Daniels
Nice clean park, great bike track in front that goes to city. Good location, but very tight for big vans.

A great caravan park. We stayed for two weeks and met some lovely people. Great green spaces for walking your dog. Shopping centres are close by including at Walkerville and Marden. The River Torrens Linear Park trail is nearby as well. All in all a great stay.

Lovely park, can be quite tight with the big vans but lovely clean amenities, they are a little dated but clean nonetheless! Big shout out to the management at this park and especially Lee who keeps up the vibes and up for a good laugh! Stayed here for an extended period of time with work commitments and never dreaded coming back! Would recommend this park, lovely swimming pool too!

It’s a great park. Easy check in and the fact it recognises the number plate on my motor home and opens the gate is a real plus. Very hard to punch in a code when sitting high in a motor home. Lots of trees and birds make it very nice. Close to Walkerville and the city.

The rooms are narrow and in summer the rooms are very hot. Narrow bathroom, not good for my overweight self. Then I hit my head on the sink. Pool is decent. I also hit my head on the bunk bed as I unpacked. Also my cabin had a massive bug infestation with ants and even roaches roaming around on the walls. Especially in bedrooms, had to sleep on the couch.

Have stayed at Levi Adelaide  Holiday Park for many year's a beautiful clean and tidy park.We have sold our caravan as travelling got a bit hard at our ages,we have now moved into a Retirement Living village at Modbury SA.Today we went and visited friends from Victoria and the park was in magnificent condition credit to all the management that maintain this beautiful park,would recommend it to caravaner's, visitors travelling to Adelaide SA house and cabins outstanding accommodation.Hope i have helped with my comment.😘
Peaceful friendly atmosphere with very clean amenities and all close to my RV. Pool very clean and friendly, understanding management.
The staff are great, the gates have a number plate reader, so easy to get in and out. The one toilet block is ancient, needs serious maintenance.

Really had a great stay at the Levi park. We were there 6 weeks and were very happy that they were able to shift some bookings around to accommodate us in a longer site. It’s a small park that has everything. The pool was great, we had fun on the tennis courts just outside the park. The facilities were always clean. Great location. We will definitely return.

Amazing service
Worth coming for weekend stay

Welcoming tidy and clean Park near to the City Centre. Nice Pool,the best camp kitchen i have ever seen,laundromat,plenty of shady trees. Even though its a smallish Park you do not feel squeezed in with your caravan. Dog friendly. The main bathrooms are clean and maintained ok although dated.

A great place in which to stay and explore Adelaide and the surrounding area. Very friendly and helpful staff, decently sized sites (we were on #45), very clean and well maintained general site and rest of the facilities plus the bonus of a pool which was welcome during a heatwave! Also well priced and we ended up extending a few days as it was such a nice place to stay. We’d originally booked into the showgrounds but cancelled there due to wanting to stay longer in Adelaide so ended up being very lucky I think.
Good location decent size swimming pool not far from supermarket and public transport
Fantastic location. Will definitely stay again. Only booked for 3 nights but extended for 6
Pool side cabin. Reasonably clean. Good location. Staff were good.

Stayed at Levi for Ashes Test Cricket.  This Caravan is so convenient to Adelaide Oval - 18 minutes from Caravan to my reserved seat on Level 3 in the Riverbank Stand.  While others were queuing for a couple of hours, I was able to sleep in and still make to the ground for the first ball 🤣🤣. Excellent Caravan Park. ✅💯%.
Lovely place to stay

The ensuite caravan sites were great.ost are tucked away in a quiet corner of the park with a nearby gate onto a beautiful oval.

The bus to the city is on the park with buses every 20 to 30 mins. It's about a 20 min trip.

Adelaide Hills are closish at 20 mins away by car.

Highly recommended

Whenever I come to Adelaide to visit family/friends I always stay at Levi in my motorhome.|It's my #1 choice of home away from home when I come home.|Lovely park, great staff & reasonably priced for a city park.|Amenities always clean, good laundry, camp kitchen & pool all centrally located.|Location is the best & a bus stop right out the front for short ride into Adelaide CBD, then buses, train or tram to anywhere. By car, easy access to SE Freeway & Nth/Sth Expressway. Short walk/drive/bus ride to Woolworths, coffee shops etc.|Or step out the back gate for a lovely walking/bike trail along the river Torrens linear park which goes all the way to CBD & on to West Beach, great if you have bikes..|Happy Trails  👍

The location is fabulous particularly if you’re a bike rider with a path winding along the river into the city.  The kitchen area is very clean and well equipped.  The showers are older but very clean, however in need of maintenance. Overall the park probably needs a bit facelift with some curb and guttering, weeding etc.
Great park to stay at when celebrating our anniversary. Been there many times before. Close to the city and good restaurants and coffee. Quiet and clran amenities. Friendly staff at check-in.
We stayed in thecaravan Park. Allways clean and tidy. Friendly staff. Koala came to visit us right above our van.

Dirty facilities and poor maintenance not worth the price

We were very disappointed with this campground. They claim the bathrooms are cleaned regularly, but they were filthy, full of bugs, and clearly neglected. There wasn’t even paper tissue, which made the experience even worse.

We paid $54 for a powered site, which is completely overpriced for the level of hygiene and care provided. For that cost, you expect at least clean bathrooms and basic supplies.

Overall, it felt unhygienic and badly maintained. Not recommended, and we won’t be returning.

Beautiful Park , lovely pool ,great  quiet location.
Good shower pressure. Cabin I stayed in had full kitchen and full size fridge.

Location is actually good quite central to the city ... now i have done a few dog friendly onsite cabin caravan parks and none were the best standard ..right ..so ..Levi onsite cabin caravan park pet freiendly best i have been to .. a bit tired yes but at least its clean PLUS mold free ..beautiful park grounds good facilties and easy in out

Absolute Gem of a receptionist.
Amanda was very friendly and helpful when we checked-in, all normal, and the rooms were perfectly fine. The real shining star was when we checked out and left our personal keys behind which Amanda rang us up to confirm they were ours and then offered to post them out to us (as we had left early and we were already several hours towards Victoria at this point). She was super helpful and not fussed at all to go out of her way!

This caravan park is not very caravan friendly. The sites for the travelling people are so small and tight you are having to ask other travellers to move their cars just so you can get your caravan into the site. Your packed in like sardines on top of each other where the full time vans have all the large caravan sites. The young girl working the reception was not that interested in helping us out she was more interested in the young fella that she was chatting to. We will not be back.
Nice service

Levi Adelaide Holiday Park is a superb choice for travelers seeking a tranquil yet central base in South Australia. The park enjoys an excellent location, situated on the leafy banks of the River Torrens. It is only about four kilometers from the heart of Adelaide city, offering a beautiful forty five minute walk or a quick fifteen minute bus ride to major attractions like the Adelaide Zoo and Botanic Gardens.

I’ve recently had the chance to stay at Levi Holiday Park, and I wanted to share my experience. First off, the park is set in such a beautiful location, surrounded by lush greenery and close to nature, which really adds to the overall atmosphere.

We have been coming here for work on several occasions and each time we found the different cabins we stayed in were comfortable and clean. I appreciated the variety of options available, from cabins to camping spots, catering to different preferences and budgets. Our favourite are the King William cabins. All cabins are well-equipped with everything we needed for our stay.

One of the highlights for me was the friendly staff. You can tell the managers set a great example for the staff to follow, all of them were welcoming and always ready to help with any questions we had. They were so easy going which made

booking and checking in so easy! You could tell they genuinely wanted to make our stay enjoyable.

The amenities were super clean and they have a small shop on site for basic supplies. We also enjoyed some lovely walks around the park after work and the peaceful atmosphere made it easy to relax.

Overall, I had a great time at Levi Holiday Park. It’s a perfect spot for tradesman working in the area, families or anyone looking to unwind in nature. I’d definitely recommend to stay here if you are visiting the area.
Nice place, Lady at the front desk very friendly and polite. 1 of the on-site managers even asked if I needed help with a problem with our motorhome.
Stayed recently while in Adelaide for work and have done on a number of previous occasions. Suites are well appointed, very comfortable and always impeccably clean.

This is the best caravan park we have ever stayed at! Beautiful camp kitchen, perfect showers in a lovely bathroom. Great staff, so nice over the phone and in person. Location is convenient. We have already booked our next stay. 10/10!
Was a really tight fit in the site, next time I’ll exaggerate the size of the van.  Nice customer service, just no swinging room
Would not recommend if you don't like being waken up by planes flying overhead early morning. Under the flight path. Very annoying if you're hanging around during the day also.

We stayed in the deluxe powered ensuite site. This beautiful space made our stay very comfortable. We camped out of our rooftop tent but the ensuite made such a difference. The beautiful shower and bathroom alerted our experience where it didn't feel like we were camping at all.
Great park. Friendly staff. Excellent coffee. Pic is the view from the van every morning. Did I mention the coffee?
Stayed in a Cabin,it was very clean and had allocated parking for each one. A great park, close to everything.

Levi Holiday Park is ideally located a short drive North of Adelaide city. Staff are friendly, coffee is not bad. Caravan sites are a little tight due to trees, but we have managed twice now with a 9 meter van with no difficulty.
Fridge in camp kitchen needs a good clean it smelss

We stayed at this beautiful holiday park for two nights while returning from Coober Pedy and heading to Melbourne.

We stayed in one of  their newer cabins that comes with a modern kitchenette and facilities.

The bed was comfortable with clean bedding. The room was clean, tidy with good hot water and room heating, plus all other amenities for a comfortable stay and a good night's sleep.

Adelaide city centre, Botanic Gardens, Zoo, Central market and other places of interest, are not too far from this location either. There are service stations and supermarkets within a reasonable distance.

So, whilst you can enjoy a comfortable, peaceful stay and a good night's sleep at this holiday park, all the POI and activities in Adelaide are also not too far from here.

The reception lady was very nice and courteous too. I highly recommend this business.
We stayed in the new single bedroom units in the front.  Really nice units, clean and tidy, and staff were very helpful.

Good location, easy access to everything. Third time we’ve stayed there and definitely prefer the King William and Botanic cabins.
Will book again
Excellent park. Large caravan sites and excellent amenities. Great location for cycling and public transport. Very quiet.
Great caravan park located near city, friendly staff and amenities clean and tidy. The small playground could do with some shelter.
Clean, quiet and comfortable cabins with full cooking facilities and big fridge freezer
Great always brilliant
Fantastic location. Stayed in a Botanic Cabin. Great view and access to river and walking trail. So close to CBD. Clean, quiet and outstanding value for money. Will be coming back.

Great caravan park. Best showers. Laundry was great, even has an iron. The boom gate recognises your number plate so no numbers to punch in. Reasonably priced. Would definitely stay again. Staff were friendly and helpful too. Thanks heaps.

En liten camping av høy kvalitet. Bra og rent felleskjøkken med felles spiseområde, vaskeri, dusjer of toalett, basseng.
Ligger like ved elva og friområde/turvei. Stolt og rolig område. Tennis og fotballbane like utenfor campingen.
Kort vei inn til Adelaide sentrum.
Anbefales på det sterkeste.
Value for money, self contained, scenic and quite place. Good to have it as a base while you go for day trips around adelaide

This caravan park is placed in an ideal location. Close to services, shopping and the city centre. The park has a lovely atmosphere and some history of days gone by. There are parklands, walking tracks and playing fields surrounding it and give a feeling of the country. The staff are really very friendly and extremely helpful. Helped us with an extension of our stay at a very busy time before Easter. Very grateful!!

The only downfalls are: the cleanliness. Found the laundry and bathroom facilities a little grubby. (We did not stay in the cabins as we had a caravan so not able to comment on these).
The gardens also need a little TLC.

This did not affect our stay (we enjoyed it very much) but thought it worth a mention if it helps to improve stays for others in the future.
Great staff.  Good rooms.

We camped in a rooftop tent with Annex. With a premium ensuite. Was wonderful for size and the ensuite was clean and had awesome water pressure. The camp kitchen had pretty much everything we needed. The pool was chilly this time of year but the kids still enjoyed their swim. Great place to stay. Close public transport. Friendly staff and community
Beautiful park in an awesome location

C'était très agréable, on avait notre emplacement pour le van juste en face de la piscine. La dame à l’accueil était très gentille.  Il y a une grande cuisine et salle à manger à disposition. Les sanitaires et douches étaient toujours très propres. On entend pratiquement pas les avions c'est pas dérangeant du tout et les emplacements sont très bien. Il y a un arrêt de bus à 2 minutes du camping, c'est parfait pour aller en ville.
Je vous recommande le camping.

The best holiday park l have ever seen. The view across the oval is magnificent and the pool area is to die for in front of Vale House. The receptionists are friendly and very helpful. The location is 7 stars out of 5 stars.😀😊

Very nice, very clean, private, quiet caravan park close to city centre with cycling lanes just minutes away. Takes around 20 minutes cycling to get to the CBD. Heaps to do around. Clean amenities, love the kitchen chill area! You can see they really take care of the place.

Usually city centre parks are not the nicest or cleanest, but we booked in extra night right away on arrival. Very clean, green and quiet place with fence all around property.

Travelling with RTT so could park everywhere, looks like all the bad comments are about big caravans not having enough room, which makes it nicer for vans and rooftop tents.

Quite small park which is nice so it doesn’t feel like a trailer park with all the caravans around you. Spot 16 is very nice, next to a big tree so you have only 2 neighbours!

Love this park.
A bit tight with a caravan, but we got in ok.
The best bit was the bike track, right next to the park,  that goes past Adelaide and onto Henley Beach.
It's a beautiful ride along the river, highly recommend.
Great place to stay for your vacation. Clean rooms, full kitchen etc.
Excellent for pets

Another wonderful time.
Unfortunately, Levi, like a lot of parks, has people who steal things. The staff where wonderful. The oval area is great for dogs.

There is no oven or airfryer for cooking. The detergent and sponge in the kitchen were terrible, which made it impossible to wash the dishes properly. The shower is very small and does not close completely, so the bathroom floor gets quite wet after showering. The sheets in the single room are of very poor quality (they seemed to be made of plastic), and the mattress is hard and thin. But despite everything, the worst part was the cleaning,   One of the blankets and mattress protector were quite dirty (photo of the blanket) large spider webs in the corners (impossible not to see them during a routine cleaning), very dirty windows and door and window tracks, as well as the corners of the floor.

Stayed for 4 night, great location for our needs with city appointments. Very friendly and helpful staff. Some sites a little tight but we got in fine and larger rig did also.
Great prices for the location, lovely park right next to it for our Lab. We recommend this park.
We always end up back here. Love the place. Amazing staff. They has ducks hehe.
we have stayed here many times over the last 5 years. It's our go to place. love the location and easy walk to Walkerville shops. will be back again soon.

Great location, I rate this the best caravan park in central Adelaide. We had a nice size site. The shower was the “best” that I have had at any park in Australia. Amenities were clean, camp kitchen looked great - we didn’t use it but many others did. Nice pool again didn’t use but many others did.
Stayed for a night very comfortable

Its true what some other reviews have said about how cramped, limited space or if you have a caravan longer than 20ft trying to manoeuvre into a majority of the sites will be less of an ease. Thankfully i had a good spacious site without any problems. But there is only a hand full. Most vehicles have to park parallel near the road as you only get enough room to put your caravan and put the annex out. Because cars are parked parallel the problem is when you arrive or exit and you simply have an awkward time trying to manoeuvre,  especially if you have a long caravan and vehicle. Great washing dryers area and card payment so no hassle trying to find change. Hot Water and flow great in the showers. Cleaned daily. Friendly staff. FLIGHT PATH regular noisy aircrafts but as curfews 11pm till 6am quieter. Near entrance to caravan park there is a children's play area, probably why not needed inside the caravan park itself, but there is a pool and sun lounges. Very close 5 min drive to shopping centres. I scored 3 stars for example  as the amenities are ready for a complete from ground up to be nice inviting and modern. Gents a shower cubicle locked out of service for over a month, other shower tiles cracked, toilet cubicles pen messages or drawings u get the idea. At dark if you look up, the glass becomes refection,  as its angled, so you could see more than u ask for , so dont look up at night and take a shower during daylight if that bothers you. Apart from that its a place that is in a good location near the city.

We stayed 3 nights. We got stayed in Torrens Cabin. They provide necessary facilities in the cabin.

There is a nice walking trail behind the park.
Good place to camp for a minute while In town.

First time there ,the cabin we were in is a little cramp ,and there was no landing at the  front door,which may pose a problem other than that the cabin in meet and tidy the staff are friendly, and the place had good amenities
Wow.  A hidden gem.  Clean amenities. Clean bbq. Very welcoming staff.  Thanks for the stay, hope to stay again.

We stayed here on 2 occasions while travelling in our caravan. Dog friendly. Friendly & helpful customer service & lovely treed positions with great river walks nearby. Convenient access into Adelaide & surrounds. Aging amenities with updating of door closures & shower accessories are needed which is our only negative.
Stayed 2 nights on premium ensuite site. We have a 23 ft van, only issue was getting van onto the site was very hard.

Booked a pet friendly cabin. Old dirty , stained bedding doona. Still payed top price. We left it clean.
Won't go back, ever
The Cabin was very neat clean.. also nice and quiet considering we were in the pet friendly area
Great customer service, clean rooms.  Great place to stay with the fur babies 🐶 with plenty of room for them to run on the oval next to the holiday park.
Excellent
Great place to stay. Was a super nice room and amazing location. Super enjoyed my stay in Adelaide.

The park offers a good camping experience with its location just outside the city. Torrens river , accessible directly from the park provides a fantastic opportunity for morning walks or evening strolls.

The powered site was a concrete slab with pebbles around that, and no grass so was difficult to set up a tent. Other than that, the spacious kitchen area is well-equipped, and the toilets and showers are kept clean and tidy. The laundry facilities, including washing machines and dryers, cost of $5 per cycle each.

This is a fabulous park in a fantastic location.  I have no negative comments about the facilities and my room was wonderful.  The only criticism is the lack of play facilities for children.  The one they do have is too small and outdated,  not ideal for the grandson.
Torrens Cabins are spot on. Beautiful location with a great little shopping district just down the road. Will definitely be back.
For a van park in the middle of town it's pretty good, but small sites.

Beautiful location, friendly staff, we arrived early and staff accommodated to us for an early check in. Room was beautiful and clean. Short walk to some nice cafés and shops, lovely walk along the Torrens.
Was amazing for a short stay close to where we had to go
Well kept amenities
Great spot to stay. Large spots for large caravans. Service great. Toilets clean. Nice park. Would recommend. Not too noisy either.

Had booked a powered site but upgraded to a cabin. The cabin was filthly. There were no sheets or towels for the kids beds. No frying pan, no dish soap. The main burner on the stove didn't work. Curtain tops were filthy with dust an grime.  Won't be back.

Great facilities so far. 👌  bathrooms child friendly and have a bath to make bathing the little one easier. Good friendly customer service. Well maintained park and a beautiful community kitchen!
Nice clean laundromat as well.
Good facilities and friendly staff. Late check-in was a breeze.
Klasse Ferienhäuser, die Botanic Cabin sind ganz neu und modern eingerichtet. Zum Einkaufszentrum mit dem Auto nur wenige Minuten. Busstation in die City gleich am Perk.
It's a cabin park. It was a well decorated cabin and was equipped with necessary items.

We booked a site, not impressed, very small sites & crammed in. Noisy as planes all day, & right next to a busy high way.No grass pebbles every where. Didn’t find the staff friendly. We booked for 7 nights left after 5. Did have nice pathways, we walked into the city took 11/2 hours. Wouldn’t go back again.
Good place highly recommended
my sister stayed in the park & really impressed with the staff.  very friendly & helpful and having their own ensuite block to use was appreciated

The caravan park itself is really nice. We stayed on a powered site which is close to the camp kitchen, toilets and showers. The hot water in the showers leaves nothing to be desired. The camp kitchen is amazing though and there is a nice walk by the river not far with buses running to the city fairly close by

We always stay here when we are in Adelaide as it's central to our needs. It's always clean, I can't comment on the amenities as we use our own(caravan). Nice Pool for hot days. Tennis court and beautifully kept grass oval are adjacent.
Needs a good clean up, toilets and showers were dirty.
Very nice park
Cabin over looking parkland was very relaxing and peaceful, even got to ser a koala
Stayed in Levi House a beautiful, comfortable building with lovely surrounds.
Stayed in the Vale House. A lovely alternative place to stay
Great park, with good amenities, etc.  However, if you have a caravan of over 20' you will find it difficult to park as the spaces are tiny.

A wonderful holiday park on the banks of the River Torrens. 3kms from Adelaide City (you won't believe your that close to a beautiful City). Cabins, Caravan Sites, Pool, Excellent Camp Kitchen, Laundry Room with Machines. Can't praise it highly enough.
Always love our stay here, either on sites or in a cabin. Great location

Camping situé près de l'aéroport donc très bruyant . Les emplacements sont petits et les voisins très proches .
Petite piscine, sanitaires propres, laundry, cuisine ...
Un peu cher , 47 $ la nuit.

On arrival of our accommodation we were not impressed with the bunk bed not made up, also not enough towels as we are 3 people, when we went to reception to ask for sheets for the bed, upon our return we found the sheets had urine stains on them not impressed, The bathroom is very small, not enough room for 3 people, the shower screen door is broken, there's mould in the bathroom. Outside table and chairs had spider webs on them. Tv remotes were all with only one battery. Not very impressed with the cabin needs a lot of maintenance.
Great place and friendly helpful staff. Cabins nice and spacious.
Beautiful park close to the city
Great place to stay. The service was exceptional.  Perfect.

This is a beautiful caravan park. Lovely clean amenities, staff were very kind, furbabies welcomed and the pool was great . The only downfall is that you can hear airplanes as it must be near the airport. However still a beautiful park.
Booked an ensuite site easy access clean shower/ensuite.
Clean facilities great staff
Friendly people
Great pool
We just had rain and a storm the whole time so it was very windy. A tree fell on someone's car.
Great place for the family to come has accessible pool and a lot of options on what to do in the kiosk area. Definitely worth coming 😊

This park was great with amazing facilities, the large middle kitchen to cook, eat and wash your dishes after made a fantastic place for families to get together for a BBQ and it even had a TV on the wall that kept the kids happy. The cabin we had was clean and comfortable and great in every way except there was no storage for food so we had to leave it on the counter top. There were only 2 knives and forks for a 4 person cabin (I am guessing these have been pilfered by prev guests. We also couldn't sleep in the bed as it sank down almost to the floor ( Just not firm enough, but the sofa was) Talking to others there they had no problems like this so I think it was just a bad/unlucky choice for us. All over Levi Park is brilliant and I would reccomend it to everyone I meet.
Location location location. This ticked all my boxes. Very clean and friendly. An excellent park. I was extremely impressed.
Amazing quiet park situated on the banks of the river Torrens.

Amazing place, great team, everyone who is staying in this caravan Park are incredibly respectful.
Allows pets in some sites, has many facilities including a tap and pay laundromat and many other well designed resources for traveling people.
The best I have ever seen in Australia.
Lovely caravan park and close to the city. Clean facilities and friendly staff. My partner and I loved our 10 day stay, will definitely return. Highly recommend.
Really clean studio cabin. Perfect for two adults. Perhaps a few extra draws and storage space for longer term guests. We stayed 7 days.
Location great for exploring Adelaide bus stop close,  ablutions good, site reasonable size

It is the first time that our food was stolen in the camp kitchen. Some beautiful Barossa Venison, steak, pork, full cage eggs, juice, and even opened milk disappeared. Unfortunately, there is no CCTV here. Hope will be one later.

That is so sad, we started traveling from QLD,NT, WA and now in SA for around 70 days. Disappointed with the people here.

But still a nice camp park to stay, very clean and helpful staff.
Great if you don't mind the constant barking dogs from all the long term residents.

A great caravan park I never knew existed. It is in a very central location and the cabins are some of the highest quality I have had the pleasure of sleeping, reading and eating in. Definitely would stay here again.

This caravan park is right under the flight path to the Adelaide airport and they NEVER stop. This is something they don't advertise. As an added negative while we were there for 3 nights there was construction works being carried out in 2 different parts of the park. We would never stay there again

The location is great and the staff kind enough, but the sites for the campervan are WAY TOO small. There were tradies on duty, so it was noisy and confusing. The pool and the kitchen are a plus but the toilets a lil old dated.
Great cabins well presented friendly staff
Best ALLROUNDER confirmed

This  was  a  very  nice  place  to  stay  at,  but,  the  Bathroom  inside  of  the  Cabin,  that  we  stayed  in,  was  very  small,  for  me.  As  I  am  a  severely  disabled  person,  but,  I  would  stay  there  again,  if  there  is  any  Cabins  with  a  little  bit  bigger  Bathroom.
Great stay , great location,  easy drive into the city and other POI 🙂

Friendly staff Much improved park great Campkitchen  Let's just hope people respect the place and keep it clean .Nice to see garden getting cleaned up and shrubs trimmed .Can't wait to try the new Cabins on our return .Would recommend this park to Anyone .
The owners are helpful,kind and caring. People staying there are lovely, the place is like an oasis in amongst the urban jungle.
Excellent park, ensuite sites are very tight, would not recommend for larger vans
This is a fantastic park,close to city and pubs for a meal . The park is very clean  and the staff are amazing, highly recommend this place, will be back definitely.
Disappointed with the reaction to a missile that made contact with the window of the unit I was in.

Had a problem with the local lads throwing wet toilet paper at the door. When I told the girl in the office the next morning, she was too busy on a personal call to attend to me. I waited she said it was "the basketball boys" like it was a regular occurrence.  Not good customer service.
Oh my goodness, AMAZINGLY comfortable bed!!!  One of the mist comfortable beds I've ever slept on!!!  Beautiful park and extremely friendly staff!!!  Thank you fir a wonderful stay!!!♥️♥️♥️

Stayed here in our caravan.

Awesome location. Amazing pool, and one of the best camp kitchens I have ever seen!!
